mapper.select: SELECT * FROM trip_block WHERE candidate_id = #{candidateId} ORDER BY trip_date, display_order
SELECT tb.* FROM trip_block tb JOIN trip_candidate tc ON tc.id = tb.candidate_id WHERE tc.trip_id = #{tripId} ORDER BY tb.trip_date, tb.display_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trip_block (candidate_id, trip_date, display_order, start_time, duration_minutes, transport_preference, memo) VALUES (#{candidateId}, #{tripDate}, #{displayOrder}, #{startTime}, #{durationMinutes}, #{transportPreference}, #{memo})
mapper.update: UPDATE trip_block SET trip_date = #{tripDate}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, start_time = #{startTime}, duration_minutes = #{durationMinutes}, transport_preference = #{transportPreference}, memo = #{memo}, transit_duration_minutes = #{transitDurationMinutes}, transit_mode = #{transitMode}, transit_option_index = #{transitOptionIndex}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE trip_block b JOIN trip_candidate tc_b ON b.candidate_id = tc_b.id JOIN trip_candidate tc_a ON tc_a.trip_id = tc_b.trip_id JOIN trip_block a ON a.candidate_id = tc_a.id AND a.trip_date = b.trip_date AND a.display_order = b.display_order - 1 SET b.transit_duration_minutes = #{durationMinutes}, b.transit_mode = #{transportMode}, b.transit_option_index = #{optionIndex} WHERE tc_b.attraction_id = #{toAttractionId} AND tc_a.attraction_id = #{fromAttractionId}
mapper.delete: DELETE tb FROM trip_block tb JOIN trip_candidate tc ON tc.id = tb.candidate_id JOIN trip t ON t.id = tc.trip_id WHERE t.member_id = #{memberId}
